initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."Charter Funding Type" = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS locally_funded_percentage
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Santa Clara'
  AND frpm."Charter School (Y/N)" = 'Y';

SELECT 
  (COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."Charter Funding Type" = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS locally_funded_percentage
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Santa Clara'
  AND frpm."Charter School (Y/N)" = 'Y';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."Charter Funding Type" = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS locally_funded_percentage
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    frpm."County Name" = 'Santa Clara'
    AND frpm."Charter School (Y/N)" = 'Y';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."Charter Funding Type" = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS locally_funded_percentage
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Santa Clara'
  AND frpm."Charter School (Y/N)" = 'Y';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."Charter Funding Type" = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS locally_funded_percentage
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Santa Clara'
  AND frpm."Charter School (Y/N)" = 'Y';
